subcodes.first_line: O sovereign seer of the realm, O monarchs who conquer the world, for years and years shall they strive and surge and roar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خسرو کشور شناساای خسروان گیتی ستان سالهای سال بکوشند و بجوشند و بخروشند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @high station of learning, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
